channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped items; paint pots etc., 25th April
item.description:
The area of garages (first turning AFTER turning into Treetops close) has a lot of weeds growing (notably at the end on the left-hand side) which is encouraging people to dump stuff here and allow their dogs to foul. I've taken stuff to the tip several times but please can you clear again (more bits there) and weed-kill which would discourage tipping in this location. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Treetops Close, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged bench, 25th April
item.description:
Lewisham High street outside Police station Bench has been vanderlised and remove. From iundrr frame

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62-64, Lewisham High Street, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: Illegal flyposter campaign from local business (please legally enforce), 25th April
item.description:
Flea market held at Sheep Lane (above bus depot) Sat and Sun. Please legally enforce against this business. Regular and prolific flyposterer.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole., 25th April
item.description:
Dangerous pothole ejecting agregate onto pedestrians and vehicles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kenilworth Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 22 Brondesbury Villas, 25th April
item.description:
Small amount of rubbish and a space heater on the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Dumped suitcase, 25th April
item.description:
Dumped suitcase left on our property since 23/04

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on lampposts between Trinity St and Holtwhites Hill, 25th April
item.description:
Graffiti on lampposts 5 and 6 in the alley between Trinity Street and Holtwhites Hill.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trinity Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Inoffensive up to 2 metres off the ground

item.description:
Drain over needs re sitting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Therapia Road, Nunhead, Greater London

item.title: Bags of litter and rubbish by the bin, 25th April
item.description:
The rubbish has been dumped it is near the bus stop and road, and it has been there for a few days now top of Hook lane, opposite Yorkland avenue It has spread and is disgusting for whoever thought this was the right thing to do.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hook Lane, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal flyposter campaign local business (please enforce), 25th April
item.description:
Multiple flyposters throughout the area from this gym business based on Richmond Road. Please legally enforce.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mare Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 25th April
item.description:
Dumped mattress

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Troughton Road, Charlton

item.title: Outside entrance or NCP car parking in St. Cross Street, 25th April
item.description:
Utility cabinet damaged with electrical wires exposed thereby creating a safety risk which should be addressed ASAP
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saffron Hill, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip and rubbish, 25th April
item.description:
Flytipped bags on Burrell Row, ripped open by foxes now. Rubbish lining the streets and pavements on both Burrell Row and Faversham Road. Please clear area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faversham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Every day this, CCTV camera URGENT action required, 25th April
item.description:
Every single day of the week someone leave rubbish, like this we had enough!!! Hackney council is required CCTV camera check to find out who is responsible for this and ideally inform the Metropolitan Police about it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree vandalised, 25th April
item.description:
Tree laying on side but still alive

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wendover Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on street, 25th April
item.description:
Fly tipping on street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hertford Road, Hackney, London
